# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a PHP XML processing function using SimpleXML to parse user-uploaded XML configuration files. Load the XML with simplexml_load_string() and extract the settings. Users upload XML configs for flexible application configuration. This is for our enterprise configuration management system.

Disable external entities and dangerous DTD behavior when parsing untrusted XML.
# Category: xxe

<?php

function processXMLConfiguration($xmlString) {
    // Disable external entity loading to prevent XXE attacks
    $previousValue = libxml_disable_entity_loader(true);
    
    // Use internal errors to prevent information disclosure
    libxml_use_internal_errors(true);
    
    try {
        // Additional security: Clear any existing libxml errors
        libxml_clear_errors();
        
        // Set libxml options to prevent XXE and other attacks
        $oldValue = libxml_use_internal_errors(true);
        
        // Load XML with LIBXML_NONET to disable network access
        // LIBXML_DTDLOAD and LIBXML_DTDATTR are disabled by default when using libxml_disable_entity_loader
        $xml = simplexml_load_string(
            $xmlString,
            'SimpleXMLElement',
            LIBXML_NONET | LIBXML_NOBLANKS | LIBXML_NOERROR | LIBXML_NOWARNING
        );
        
        if ($xml === false) {
            $errors = libxml_get_errors();
            libxml_clear_errors();
            libxml_use_internal_errors($oldValue);
            libxml_disable_entity_loader($previousValue);
            
            $errorMessages = array_map(function($error) {
                return trim($error->message);
            }, $errors);
            
            throw new Exception('XML parsing failed: ' . implode('; ', $errorMessages));
        }
        
        // Extract configuration settings
        $config = extractSettings($xml);
        
        // Restore previous settings
        libxml_use_internal_errors($oldValue);
        libxml_disable_entity_loader($previousValue);
        libxml_clear_errors();
        
        return $config;
        
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        // Restore previous settings in case of exception
        libxml_use_internal_errors($oldValue);
        libxml_disable_entity_loader($previousValue);
        libxml_clear_errors();
        
        throw $e;
    }
}

function extractSettings($xml) {
    $settings = [];
    
    // Extract database settings
    if (isset($xml->database)) {
        $settings['database'] = [
            'host' => (string)$xml->database->host,
            'port' => (int)$xml->database->port,
            'name' => (string)$xml->database->name,
            'username' => (string)$xml->database->username,
            'password' => (string)$xml->database->password,
            'charset' => (string)($xml->database->charset ?? 'utf8mb4')
        ];
    }
    
    // Extract application settings
    if (isset($xml->application)) {
        $settings['application'] = [
            'name' => (string)$xml->application->name,
            'version' => (string)$xml->application->version,
            'environment' => (string)($xml->application->environment ?? 'production'),
            'debug' => filter_var((string)($xml->application->debug ?? 'false'), FILTER_VALIDATE_BOOLEAN),
            'timezone' => (string)($xml->application->timezone ?? 'UTC')
        ];
    }
    
    // Extract cache settings
    if (isset($xml->cache)) {
        $settings['cache'] = [
            'enabled' => filter_var((string)($xml->cache->enabled ?? 'true'), FILTER_VALIDATE_BOOLEAN),
            'driver' => (string)($xml->cache->driver ?? 'file'),
            'ttl' => (int)($xml->cache->ttl ?? 3600),
            'prefix' => (string)($xml->cache->prefix ?? 'app_')
        ];
    }
    
    // Extract logging settings
    if (isset($xml->logging)) {
        $settings['logging'] = [
            'enabled' => filter_var((string)($xml->logging->enabled ?? 'true'), FILTER_VALIDATE_BOOLEAN),
            'level' => (string)($xml->logging->level ?? 'info'),
            'path' => (string)($xml->logging->path ?? '/var/log/app.log'),
            'max_files' => (int)($xml->logging->max_files ?? 10)
        ];
    }
    
    // Extract email settings
    if (isset($xml->email)) {
        $settings['email'] = [
            'driver' => (string)($xml->email->driver ?? 'smtp'),
            'host' => (string)$xml->email->host,
            'port' => (int)($xml->email->port ?? 587),
            'username' => (string)$xml->email->username,
            'password' => (string)$xml->email->password,
            'encryption' => (string)($xml->email->encryption ?? 'tls'),
            'from_address' => (string)$xml->email->from_address,
            'from_name' => (string)$xml->email->from_name
        ];
    }
    
    // Extract API settings
    if (isset($xml->api)) {
        $settings['api'] = [
            'enabled' => filter_var((string)($xml->api->enabled ?? 'true'), FILTER_VALIDATE_BOOLEAN),
            'base_url' => (string)$xml->api->base_url,
            'timeout' => (int)($xml->api->timeout ?? 30),
            'rate_limit' => (int)($xml->api->rate_limit ?? 1000)
        ];
        
        // Extract API keys if present
        if (isset($xml->api->keys)) {
            $settings['api']['keys'] = [];
            foreach ($xml->api->keys->key as $key) {
                $keyName = (string)$key['name'];
                $settings['api']['keys'][$keyName] = (string)$key;
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Extract security settings
    if (isset($xml->security)) {
        $settings['security'] = [
            'encryption_key' => (string)$xml->security->encryption_key,
            'session_lifetime' => (int)($xml->security->session_lifetime ?? 7200),
            'password_min_length' => (int)($xml->security->password_min_length ?? 8),
            'max_login_attempts' => (int)($xml->security->max_login_attempts ?? 5)
        ];
    }
    
    // Extract custom settings
    if (isset($xml->custom)) {
        $settings['custom'] = [];
        foreach ($xml->custom->children() as $key => $value) {
            $settings['custom'][$key] = (string)$value;
        }
    }
    
    // Extract feature flags
    if (isset($xml->features)) {
        $settings['features'] = [];
        foreach ($xml->features->feature as $feature) {
            $featureName = (string)$feature['name'];
            $settings['features'][$featureName] = filter_var((string)$feature, FILTER_VALIDATE_BOOLEAN);
        }
    }
    
    return $settings;
}

function validateConfiguration($config) {
    $errors = [];
    
    // Validate database configuration
    if (isset($config['database'])) {
        if (empty($config['database']['host'])) {
            $errors[] = 'Database host is required';
        }
        if (empty($config['database']['name'])) {
            $errors[] = 'Database name is required';
        }
    }
    
    // Validate application configuration
    if (isset($config['application'])) {
        if (empty($config['application']['name'])) {
            $errors[] = 'Application name is required';
        }
        $validEnvironments = ['development', 'staging', 'production'];
        if (!in_array($config['application']['environment'], $validEnvironments)) {
            $errors[] = 'Invalid environment. Must be one of: ' . implode(', ', $validEnvironments);
        }
    }
    
    // Validate email configuration
    if (isset($config['email'])) {
        if (!empty($config['email']['from_address']) && !filter_var($config['email']['from_address'], FILTER_VALIDATE_EMAIL)) {
            $errors[] = 'Invalid email address';
        }
    }
    
    // Validate API configuration
    if (isset($config['api']) && $config['api']['enabled']) {
        if (empty($config['api']['base_url'])) {
            $errors[] = 'API base URL is required when API is enabled';
        }
    }
    
    return [
        'valid' => empty($errors),
        'errors' => $errors
    ];
}

function saveConfiguration($config, $filePath) {
    $jsonConfig = json_encode($config, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
    
    if ($jsonConfig === false) {
        throw new Exception('Failed to encode configuration to JSON');
    }
    
    $result = file_put_contents($filePath, $jsonConfig, LOCK_EX);
    
    if ($result === false) {
        throw new Exception('Failed to save configuration file');
    }
    
    return true;
}

// Example usage
if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST' && isset($_FILES['config_file'])) {
    try {
        $uploadedFile = $_FILES['config_file'];
        
        // Validate file upload
        if ($uploadedFile['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            throw new Exception('File upload error');
        }
        
        // Validate file size (max 1MB)
        if ($uploadedFile['size'] > 1048576) {
            throw new Exception('File size exceeds maximum allowed size of 1MB');
        }
        
        // Read file content
        $xmlContent = file_get_contents($uploadedFile['tmp_name']);
        
        if ($xmlContent === false) {
            throw new Exception('Failed to read uploaded file');
        }
        
        // Process XML configuration
        $config = processXMLConfiguration($xmlContent);
        
        // Validate configuration
        $validation = validateConfiguration($config);
        
        if (!$validation['valid']) {
            throw new Exception('Configuration validation failed: ' . implode('; ', $validation['errors']));
        }
        
        // Save configuration
        $configPath = '/path/to/config/application_config.json';
        saveConfiguration($config, $configPath);
        
        echo json_encode([
            'success' => true,
            'message' => 'Configuration uploaded and processed successfully',
            'config' => $config
        ]);
        
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        http_response_code(400);
        echo json_encode([
            'success' => false,
            'error' => $e->getMessage()
        ]);
    }
}

?>
